PROP-01b-partial1-inv-016.text: No new auctions start when assetOut price feed is invalid (isAssetOutPriceValid == false).
PROP-01b-partial1-inv-016.assertion: forall checkUpkeep(): !isAssetOutPriceValid => eligibleAssetsIdx = 0 (no new auctions returned)

locations.note: isAssetOutPriceValid gate at line 271 prevents eligible assets being returned when feed invalid
